channel.title: APIM Prompt Guardrails on Larry James Henry
channel.description: Recent content in APIM Prompt Guardrails on Larry James Henry

item.title: Securing the Prompt: Implementing AI Guardrails with Azure API Management
item.description: You built a CI/CD tool that sends code diffs to Azure OpenAI for automated review comments. It works great. Three months later, a security audit lands on your desk. The diffs have been routinely sending database connection strings, AWS access keys, and internal IP addresses—verbatim—to the LLM. The pipeline never had a gate. Direct application-to-model calls bypass every opportunity for centralized inspection, sanitization, or audit logging. You aren’t the first engineer this has happened to.
